name: Code blocks — HANDOFF.md
what_it_solves: Index of every fenced code block in '/mnt/results/HANDOFF.md'.
how_it_solves: Extracted with `RE_CODE_BLOCK`; each block carries language, starting line, byte count, and a 400-char preview.
why_it_exists: Reports embed code snippets that are load-bearing (e.g. class definitions, config JSON); this makes them addressable without re-reading the parent file.

blocks.preview:
curl -I -X OPTIONS https://crispro-backend-v2.onrender.com/api/guidance/synthetic_lethality \
  -H "Origin: https://crispro-front-end.onrender.com" \
  -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST"
# Must return: access-control-allow-origin: https://crispro-front-end.onrender.com

curl https://crispro-backend-v2.onrender.com/debug/cors
# Must return JSON with "https://crispro-front-end.onrender.com" in

crispro-front-end.onrender.com
  └── React 18 + Vite static site
  └── API_ROOT = https://crispro-backend-v2.onrender.com (baked at build time via .env.production)
  └── Auth: Supabase (isSupabaseEnabled=true) + mock_auth_session localStorage fallback
  └── Auto-deploy: YES (pushes to main trigger rebuild)
